step_title: 直接以 live protocol/session 事实确认 protocol 注入副作用，并条件续入最小 live acceptance
summary: Direct live server facts prove the protocol injection side effect is already live: GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/protocol and /session now show execution_spec_id=bootstrap-test-execution-spec-v1, workflow_id=bootstrap-workflow-v1, initial_stage=step1, stage_order=[step1,step2,step3,task_start], current_stage=step1. The prior l2-step1b injection can therefore be treated as completed by live side effect. In the same run, continued minimal live acceptance stopped at the first new breakpoint: trusted system broadcast -> group context failed because POST /api/v1/messages returned internal_error ('dict' object has no attribute 'event_type'). Subsequent live reads showed observed_statuses=[], current_stage still step1, gate_snapshot.current_stage=null, satisfied_gates=[], advanced_from/advanced_to/advanced_at=null, and latest group_context content unchanged except for base group metadata.
blocker: trusted system broadcast fails: POST /api/v1/messages with intended system/context payload returned internal_error ('dict' object has no attribute 'event_type'); no visible group-context/session change was produced.
tests: GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/protocol; GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/session; GET /api/v1/groups/by-slug/public-lobby/context; POST /api/v1/messages trusted-system-broadcast attempt; GET /api/v1/messages?group_id=54b12c32-dbd3-46d8-97ee-22bf8a499709&limit=3&offset=0
